# HPD.ML.DataSources.JsonOptions

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Kind: `class`

Configuration for JSON/JSONL loading.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class JsonOptions : System.IEquatable<HPD.ML.DataSources.JsonOptions>
```

```csharp
public JsonOptions()
```

## Properties

### Encoding

```csharp
public System.Text.Encoding Encoding { get; init; }
```

File encoding. Default: UTF-8.

### InferenceScanRows

```csharp
public int InferenceScanRows { get; init; }
```

Maximum rows to scan for schema inference. Default: 100.

### IsJsonLines

```csharp
public System.Nullable<bool> IsJsonLines { get; init; }
```

True = one JSON object per line (JSONL). False = single JSON array. Default: auto-detect from first character.

### MaxFlattenDepth

```csharp
public int MaxFlattenDepth { get; init; }
```

Maximum depth to flatten nested objects. Default: 1 (top-level only).

### PropertyMapping

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string>? PropertyMapping { get; init; }
```

JSON property name mapping to column names. Example: { ["user.name"] = "UserName" } flattens nested objects.

### TypeHints

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, System.Type>? TypeHints { get; init; }
```

Explicit type hints per column name. Overrides inference.
